request_summary: Create a single-page interactive HTML visual guide at laecon/guides/modeling-decision-guide.html covering 10 sections (OLS/GLS/WLS, logit/probit, ordered/grouped logit, GLM, panel data, time series, decision trees, random forest, gradient boosting, SHAP) with when-to-use, Python packages, key parameters, references, and decision flowcharts.

decomposed_tasks.description: Author a single-page interactive HTML reference guide with 10 sections covering basic stats through advanced ML, grounded in existing KB files and LAECON Constitution Art. 10.

stages.name: content_synthesis
stages.description: Synthesize existing KB files into section-by-section content for the guide

stages.name: html_authoring
stages.description: Author single-page interactive HTML with navigation, flowcharts, and styling

stages.name: validation
stages.description: Verify 10 sections, 5 fields each, navigation works, references correct

content_sources.citation: J. Scott Long, Regression Models for Categorical and Limited Dependent Variables, 1997
Lundberg & Lee, A Unified Approach to Interpreting Model Predictions (SHAP), 2017

exemption.reason: Single dispatchable need (one HTML file, 10 structural sections of a single guide). No decomposition signals fire. 3/3 on 3-Q.

prior_verdicts.relation: KB guide completed; visual guide is a separate deliverable in the same LAECON session

execution_recommendation.rationale: Single-file HTML authoring grounded in existing KB content. No data work, no dashboard design, no automation. Orchestrator can author directly or dispatch general agent.
